description: The user did not specify a clear issue description

messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?
Hello.  Hi.  Hi.  How are you?

Thank you for the enthusiastic greeting! I'm doing well, thank you for asking. Now, let's get started with your grievance registration. I've taken note of your name. Thank you, [Name]! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under?

Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?
